mode_note: Run WITHOUT --bare (OAuth-only environment; --bare requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY by CLI design). Plugin double-injection suppressed via [no-skills]-prefixed temp pack copy; SessionStart ambient (superpowers, CLAUDE.md) visible. NOT comparable to bare-mode numbers.

arms.note: 2026-07-15 pilot run, quota-truncated at 3/5 reps (429). CONSTRUCT-INVALID — retained as audit trail only, EXCLUDED from quantitative baseline (Codex-sparred call): both failures are eval-design artifacts, not subject failures. Taxonomy: (a) subject re-ran the test suite — finishing-a-development-branch's own Step 1 ('verify tests') instructs exactly that; the rubric never exempted skill-mandated verification; (b) subject grounded itself in the REAL repo via tools and correctly halted on the fiction/reality mismatch (multi-turn tool-bearing subjects; directive arms were single-turn 15-24s, this arm 7-14min/rep). REDESIGN before re-measuring: rubric exemption for skill-mandated verification + single-turn constraint or isolated fictional repo.

interpretation: Directive arms at ceiling under claude-fable-5 in deployed-ambient mode — composition step-text directives ([CURRENT]/MUST INVOKE/continuation) are followed 16/16; consistent with the PR #104 finding that step-text placement works where advisory hints measured 0/5. The over-fire control arm is construct-invalid (see its entry) and contributes no baseline number — its redesign is the pack's known gap. Informational only — NOT a CI gate (variance unestablished; see README revival criterion).
threats_to_validity: Ceiling is an UPPER BOUND: (1) pack prompts carry the full-format mandatory-line that a real 2-skill compact render omits (deliberate idealization — re-measure before editing prompts); (2) the [no-skills] marker token is subject-visible in this mode; (3) repo CLAUDE.md compliance-priming is readable in deployed-ambient mode. See README Threats to validity.
